items.summaryEn: The Israeli Air Force struck Iranian gas infrastructure in the south of the country a short while ago, an Israeli official says. According to the official, the strikes hit Iran's largest gas processing facility, in the Bushehr Province. Iran's Tasnim news agency had reported that the strikes hit facilities of the South Pars offshore gas field and Asaluyeh oil industry.
